title: Redline Revision Diff
description: Validates the diff record produced after a redline-driven visual specification revision.

redline_round.description: Adjudication round whose redline drove the revision.

redline_target_field.description: Specificity contract field targeted by the redline.

pre_revision_html_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the pre-revision HTML or equivalent source.

post_revision_html_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the post-revision HTML or equivalent source.

pre_revision_png_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the pre-revision PNG capture.

post_revision_png_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the post-revision PNG capture.

phash_distance.description: Perceptual hash distance between pre- and post-revision captures; must exceed the default visual noise floor.

element_tree_diff_summary.description: Summary of structural element-tree changes made to address the redline.

addressed.description: Whether the redline was substantively addressed by the revision.
